name: Windir
description:
'''Windir''' ({{translation|Warrior}}) was a [[black metal]] band from [[Sogndal Municipality]], Norway. The band was formed in 1994 by vocalist and multi-instrumentalist [[Terje Bakken|Terje "Valfar" Bakken]], and released its debut album, ''[[Sóknardalr]]'', in 1997. 

Windir produced four albums in their nearly ten years of existence. The band broke up in March 2004 after frontman Valfar died of [[hypothermia]] after becoming caught in a blizzard on his way to his family's cabin in Norway. Following his death, the remaining band members went on to form several new bands, including [[Vreid]], Mistur, and [[Cor Scorpii]].{{Citation needed|date=April 2026}}
